subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-08
subcodes.first_line: All days of his (Abul Fazl's) life were spent in the service of the Cause of God. His will and desire
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
